In the international world we find ourselves in, the pacifist nature is not effective in dealing with people whether we want to or don't want to deal with them. In Central America, they would turn and walk away rather than visit problems in our own back yard. They're largely responsible for the welfare state that exists today in our country. Largely, they've made it easier for someone to draw money than make money working.

It's a party that attempts to be the friends of the people, the masses, the bread and butter of the country. They try to befriend labor in general which is the grass roots, the backbone. For the general welfare of the nation. The core of the party is concerned for that, sympathetic to that.

Business, in general, in this country is its backbone. They're very supportive of its growth and development and that's all types of business, agriculture and industry. The example is a result really. There are more people working in all walks of life than there were 4 years ago. I don't think that's an accident. The firmness in dealing with international matters. Not just firmness. It's firm and it's also explicit.
